mapper.select:
SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY APRV_DT DESC) RNUM , APRV_NO , EMP_ID , APRV_SE , APRV_DOC_NO , APRV_TTL , APRV_DT , APRV_END_DT , APRV_EMRG_YN , APRV_RLS_YN , APRV_STP , APRV_STTS , APRV_DEL_YN , APRV_DATA , APRV_DEPT_CD , APRV_WORK_TAG FROM APPROVAL WHERE 1 = 1 AND APRV_STTS != '회수'
) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY APRV_DT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL WHERE 1 = 1 AND APRV_STTS != '회수'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON A.APRV_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.APRV_DEPT_CD = #{deptFilter}
AND A.APRV_STTS LIKE '%' || #{statusFilter} || '%'
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.APRV_DEPT_CD LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.APRV_DT DESC) AS RNUM , A.APRV_NO, A.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NM AS docWriterNm , A.APRV_DEPT_CD, D.DEPT_NM AS docWriterDeptNm , A.APRV_TTL, A.APRV_DT, A.APRV_END_DT, A.APRV_STTS, A.APRV_DATA FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON A.APRV_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.APRV_DEPT_CD = #{deptFilter}
AND A.APRV_STTS LIKE '%' || #{statusFilter} || '%'
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - 9 AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY T.RNUM ASC

SELECT A.APRV_NO, A.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NM AS docWriterNm, A.APRV_DEPT_CD, D.DEPT_NM AS docWriterDeptNm, A.APRV_TTL, A.APRV_DT, A.APRV_END_DT, A.APRV_STTS FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON A.APRV_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE A.APRV_STTS = '결재완료' AND APRV_WORK_TAG = 'C03'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.APRV_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY A.APRV_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL A JOIN APRV_LINE L ON A.APRV_NO = L.APRV_NO JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_STTS = '진행중' AND A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND L.APRV_LN_STTS = 'APRV02001' AND L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND L.APRV_LN_LVL = ( SELECT MIN(INNER_L.APRV_LN_LVL) FROM APRV_LINE INNER_L WHERE INNER_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND INNER_L.APRV_LN_STTS = 'APRV02001' )
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.APRV_NO ASC) RNUM , A.APRV_NO , A.EMP_ID AS DOC_WRITER_ID , E.EMP_NM AS DOC_WRITER_NM , E.EMP_JBGD AS POS_NM , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(E.DEPT_CD) AS DOC_WRITER_DEPT_NM , A.APRV_SE , A.APRV_DOC_NO , A.APRV_TTL , A.APRV_DT , A.APRV_END_DT , A.APRV_EMRG_YN , A.APRV_RLS_YN , A.APRV_STP , A.APRV_STTS , A.APRV_DEL_YN , A.APRV_DATA , A.APRV_LN_CNT , L.APRV_LN_NO , L.APRV_LN_LVL , L.EMP_ID AS APRV_ID , L.APRV_LN_STTS , L.APRV_LN_DT , L.APRV_LN_CN FROM APPROVAL A JOIN APRV_LINE L ON A.APRV_NO = L.APRV_NO JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_STTS = '진행중' AND A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND L.APRV_LN_STTS = 'APRV02001' AND L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND L.APRV_LN_LVL = ( SELECT MIN(INNER_L.APRV_LN_LVL) FROM APRV_LINE INNER_L WHERE INNER_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND INNER_L.APRV_LN_STTS = 'APRV02001' )
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY APRV_DT ASC

SELECT A.APRV_LN_NO , A.APRV_NO , A.APRV_LN_LVL , A.EMP_ID AS APRV_ID , A.APRV_LN_STTS , A.APRV_LN_DT , A.APRV_LN_CN , B.EMP_JBGD , FN_GET_DEPT_NM(B.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_NM , B.EMP_NM AS APRV_NM , B.EMP_SIGN , B.EMP_PROFILE FROM APRV_LINE A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} ORDER BY A.APRV_LN_LVL ASC -- 결재 순서 정렬
mapper.sql: A.APRV_NO , A.EMP_ID AS DOC_WRITER_ID , A.APRV_SE , A.APRV_DOC_NO , A.APRV_TTL , A.APRV_DT , A.APRV_END_DT , A.APRV_EMRG_YN , A.APRV_RLS_YN , A.APRV_STP , A.APRV_STTS , A.APRV_DEL_YN , A.APRV_DATA , A.APRV_LN_CNT , A.APRV_WORK_TAG , FN_GET_PROJ_NM(A.APRV_WORK_TAG) AS APRV_WORK_TAG_NM , E.EMP_NM AS DOC_WRITER_NM , E.EMP_JBGD AS POS_NM , E.EMP_SIGN AS DOC_WRITER_EMP_SIGN , E.EMP_PROFILE AS DOC_WRITER_EMP_PROFILE , D.DEPT_NM AS DOC_WRITER_DEPT_NM
mapper.select:
SELECT
, B.EXPND_DOC_NO , C.BGT_CD , C.BGT_M_CD , C.EXPND_AMT , C.EXPND_RSN , BD.BGT_ITM_NM FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_EXPND_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.EXPND_DOC_NO LEFT JOIN APRV_EXPND_DTL C ON B.EXPND_DOC_NO = C.EXPND_DOC_NO LEFT JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL BD ON C.BGT_CD = BD.BGT_CD AND C.BGT_M_CD = BD.BGT_M_CD WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.VCT_DOC_CD , B.VCT_DOC_BGNG , B.VCT_DOC_END , B.VCT_DOC_RSN , B.VCT_TOTAL_DAYS FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_VCT_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.ATT_TYPE_ID WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.ATT_TYPE_ID , B.BZTRP_PLC , B.BZTRP_START , B.BZTRP_END , B.BZTRP_RSN FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_BZTRP_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.ATT_TYPE_ID WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.EXCS_WORK_DOC_BGNG , B.EXCS_WORK_DOC_END , B.EXCS_WORK_DOC_RES FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.ATT_TYPE_ID WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.RPT_DOC_NO , B.RPT_SE , B.RPT_CN FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_RPT_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.RPT_DOC_NO WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.NML_DOC_NO , B.NML_CN FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_NOMAL_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.NML_DOC_NO WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT , B.RSGNTN_DOC_NO , B.RSGNTN_DT , B.RSGNTN_RSN FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN APRV_RSGNTN_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.RSGNTN_DOC_NO WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
mapper.update:
UPDATE APPROVAL SET
APRV_STTS = '반려'
APRV_STTS = '결재완료', APRV_END_DT = SYSDATE
APRV_STTS = APRV_STTS -- 오류방지
WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM APRV_LINE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND APRV_LN_STTS != 'APRV02002' )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.EMP_ID , A.APRV_TTL , A.APRV_STTS , A.APRV_DEL_YN FROM APPROVAL A JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.APRV_STTS = '결재완료' AND A.APRV_STTS != '회수' ) WHERE 1 = 1
AND APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT T.RNUM, T.APRV_NO, T.APRV_TTL, T.APRV_DT, T.APRV_END_DT,T.APRV_DATA, T.APRV_STTS, T.APRV_DEL_YN, T.DOC_WRITER_NM FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY APRV_END_DT DESC) RNUM , A.APRV_NO , A.APRV_TTL , A.APRV_DT , A.APRV_END_DT , A.APRV_STTS , A.APRV_DEL_YN , A.APRV_DATA , A.APRV_WORK_TAG , E.EMP_NM AS DOC_WRITER_NM FROM APPROVAL A JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.APRV_STTS = '결재완료' AND A.APRV_STTS != '회수'
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY T.APRV_END_DT DESC
SELECT * FROM APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND EXCS_WORK_STTS = '대기'
SELECT * FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND VCT_STTS = '대기'
SELECT * FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '대기'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_APRV_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APPROVAL ( APRV_NO , APRV_DEPT_CD , EMP_ID , APRV_SE , APRV_DOC_NO , APRV_TTL , APRV_DT , APRV_EMRG_YN , APRV_RLS_YN , APRV_STP , APRV_STTS , APRV_DEL_YN , APRV_DATA , APRV_LN_CNT , APRV_END_DT , APRV_WORK_TAG ) VALUES(#{aprvNo}, #{aprvDeptCd}, #{empId}, #{aprvSe}, #{aprvDocNo}, #{aprvTtl} , SYSDATE, #{aprvEmrgYn}, #{aprvRlsYn}, 0, '진행중', 'N', #{aprvData}, 0, '', #{aprvWorkTag})

SELECT SEQ_NML_DOC_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APRV_NOMAL_DOC (NML_DOC_NO, NML_CN, EMP_ID, NML_STTS_YN) VALUES(#{aprvDocNo}, #{nmlCn}, #{empId}, 'N')

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO APRV_LINE ( APRV_LN_NO, APRV_NO, EMP_ID, APRV_LN_LVL, APRV_LN_STTS ) VALUES ( SEQ_APRV_LINE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{item.aprvNo}, #{item.empId}, #{item.aprvLnLvl}, 'APRV02001' )

mapper.select: SELECT A.FILE_ID, A.EMP_ID, A.FILE_DT, A.FILE_DEL_YN, A.FILE_STTS, B.FILE_DTL_ID, B.FILE_DTL_PATH, B.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, B.FILE_DTL_O_NM, B.FILE_DTL_EXT, B.FILE_DTL_DT, B.FILE_DTL_DEL_YN FROM FILE_TB A LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID WHERE A.FILE_ID = #{fileId}
SELECT NVL(D.DEPT_NM, '미지정') AS "team", COUNT(A.APRV_NO) AS "value" FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON A.APRV_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD GROUP BY D.DEPT_NM

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(A.APRV_DT, 'FMMM') || '월' AS "month", NVL(D.DEPT_NM, '미지정') AS "team" FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON A.APRV_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE A.APRV_DT IS NOT NULL -- 올해(현재 연도) 데이터만 가져오도록 AND TO_CHAR(A.APRV_DT, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') ) -- 행(Row)으로 있던 부서명을 열(Column)로 회전시킴! PIVOT ( COUNT(*) FOR "team" IN ( '개발1팀' AS "개발1팀", '개발2팀' AS "개발2팀", '개발3팀' AS "개발3팀", '영업팀' AS "영업팀", '경영지원팀' AS "경영지원팀" ) ) ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REPLACE("month", '월', '')) ASC
SELECT A.EMP_ID AS DOC_WRITER_ID , A.APRV_TTL , E.EMP_NM AS DOC_WRITER_NM , E.EMP_JBGD AS POS_NM FROM APPROVAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
SELECT EMP_ID FROM ( SELECT EMP_ID FROM APRV_LINE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND APRV_LN_STTS = 'APRV02001' ORDER BY APRV_LN_LVL ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.APRV_NO DESC) RNUM , A.APRV_NO , A.EMP_ID AS DOC_WRITER_ID , E.EMP_NM AS DOC_WRITER_NM , A.APRV_SE , A.APRV_DOC_NO , A.APRV_TTL , A.APRV_DT , A.APRV_END_DT , A.APRV_EMRG_YN , A.APRV_RLS_YN , A.APRV_STP , A.APRV_STTS , A.APRV_DEL_YN , A.APRV_DATA , A.APRV_LN_CNT , A.APRV_WORK_TAG , L.APRV_LN_NO , L.APRV_LN_LVL , L.EMP_ID AS APRV_ID , L.APRV_LN_STTS , L.APRV_LN_DT , L.APRV_LN_CN FROM APPROVAL A JOIN APRV_LINE L ON A.APRV_NO = L.APRV_NO JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.APRV_STTS != '회수' AND L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND L.APRV_LN_STTS IN ('APRV02002', 'APRV02003')
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM APRV_LINE SUB_L WHERE SUB_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND SUB_L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND SUB_L.APRV_LN_STTS NOT IN ('APRV02002', 'APRV02003') )
AND L.APRV_LN_LVL = ( SELECT MAX(MAX_L.APRV_LN_LVL) FROM APRV_LINE MAX_L WHERE MAX_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND MAX_L.EMP_ID = #{empId} )
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY APRV_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL A JOIN APRV_LINE L ON A.APRV_NO = L.APRV_NO JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE A.APRV_DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.APRV_STTS != '회수' AND L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND L.APRV_LN_STTS IN ('APRV02002', 'APRV02003')
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM APRV_LINE SUB_L WHERE SUB_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND SUB_L.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND SUB_L.APRV_LN_STTS NOT IN ('APRV02002', 'APRV02003') )
AND L.APRV_LN_LVL = ( SELECT MAX(MAX_L.APRV_LN_LVL) FROM APRV_LINE MAX_L WHERE MAX_L.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO AND MAX_L.EMP_ID = #{empId} )
AND A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.APRV_TTL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.EMP_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR E.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT P.PROJ_NO AS projNo, P.PROJ_TTL AS projTtl FROM PROJECT P WHERE ( P.EMP_ID = #{empId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PROJECT_PARTICIPANT PP WHERE PP.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO AND PP.EMP_ID = #{empId} ) ) AND P.PROJ_STTS IN ('진행', '지연') ORDER BY P.PROJ_END_DT DESC

SELECT P.PROJ_NO AS projNo, P.PROJ_TTL AS projTtl FROM PROJECT P WHERE ( P.EMP_ID = #{empId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PROJECT_PARTICIPANT PP WHERE PP.PROJ_NO = P.PROJ_NO AND PP.EMP_ID = #{empId} ) ) AND P.PROJ_STTS = '완료' AND P.PROJ_END_DT >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3) ORDER BY P.PROJ_END_DT DESC

SELECT D.BGT_CD, D.BGT_M_CD, D.BGT_ITM_NM, NVL(D.BGT_AMT, 0) AS bgtAmt, NVL(D.BGT_EXCN, 0) AS bgtExcn FROM BUDGET_MASTER M INNER JOIN BUDGET_DETAIL D ON M.BGT_M_CD = D.BGT_M_CD WHERE M.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND M.BGT_YR = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') ORDER BY D.BGT_CD ASC

SELECT C.BGT_M_CD , C.BGT_CD , C.EXPND_AMT , C.EXPND_RSN FROM APPROVAL A INNER JOIN APRV_EXPND_DOC B ON A.APRV_DOC_NO = B.EXPND_DOC_NO INNER JOIN APRV_EXPND_DTL C ON B.EXPND_DOC_NO = C.EXPND_DOC_NO WHERE A.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL WHERE 1 = 1 AND APRV_STTS = '회수'

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY APRV_DT DESC) RNUM , APRV_NO , EMP_ID , APRV_SE , APRV_DOC_NO , APRV_TTL , APRV_DT , APRV_END_DT , APRV_EMRG_YN , APRV_RLS_YN , APRV_STP , APRV_STTS , APRV_DEL_YN , APRV_DATA , APRV_DEPT_CD , APRV_WORK_TAG FROM APPROVAL WHERE 1 = 1 AND APRV_STTS = '회수'
) T WHERE RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10) - (10 - 1) AND (#{currentPage} * 10) ORDER BY APRV_DT DESC
